reasoning_content: The SYsULexer.tokens.hpp file is generated during the build process. Let me rebuild task2 to generate it with the new tokens.

action.command: cd /workspace/YatCC && rm -rf build/task/2 && cmake --build build -t task2 2>&1 | tail -20

tool_call.name: terminal
tool_call.arguments: {"command": "cd /workspace/YatCC && rm -rf build/task/2 && cmake --build build -t task2 2>&1 | tail -20", "summary": "Clean and rebuild task2"}
